title: tephrosia baueri
intro: Tephrosia baueri, also known as the golden leaf or Bauers tephrosia, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to South Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves being used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Tephrosia baueri include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia baueri can be made by infusing the roots and leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and crushing the plant to use as a powder or capsule.
